strategy_sections.mission: DA 1.5 -> 45 in 90 days. Target 500-700+ referring domains from 27.
three_laws: Parallel execution - all tiers run simultaneously
Deep-link everything - 70% of new backlinks to inner pages, not homepage
Diversify or die - anchor text, link type, referring domain type must vary

tiers.tier1: Foundation Profiles - DR 85+ sites (25 profiles, Week 1)
tiers.tier3: YouTube Video Domination (20 videos in 90 days)

unlinked_mentions.mention_text: CNC ELECTRIC brand referenced multiple times as product line
unlinked_mentions.context_snippet: c-power.pk is a competitor selling CNC brand products. They mention CNC ELECTRIC as a brand/product line throughout their site but have zero links back to cncelectric.pk
unlinked_mentions.action: Contact c-power.pk — they sell CNC products, should link to authorized distributor
unlinked_mentions.email_draft:
Subject: CNC Electric Pakistan — authorized distributor link

Hi,

I noticed c-power.pk carries CNC brand electrical products. As the sole authorized distributor of CNC brand in Pakistan, we'd appreciate if you could add a link to https://www.cncelectric.pk as the official source for product specs, warranty info, and technical support.

This helps your customers verify authenticity and access warranty services.

Best regards,
CNC Electric Pakistan team

unlinked_mentions.mention_text: CNC Electric mentioned in "Best Electric Breaker in Pakistan" blog post
unlinked_mentions.context_snippet: CNC parent company blog post about best breakers in Pakistan. References CNC Electric products and pricing but does NOT link to cncelectric.pk (only links to cncele.com, aliexpress, etc.)
unlinked_mentions.action: Contact CNC HQ (cncele.com) — parent company should link to authorized Pakistan distributor
unlinked_mentions.email_draft:
Subject: Add cncelectric.pk link to Pakistan breaker blog post

Hi CNC team,

The blog post at cncele.com/blog/best-electric-breaker-in-pakistan/ references CNC breakers in Pakistan but doesn't link to cncelectric.pk — your authorized Pakistan distributor.

Adding a link to https://www.cncelectric.pk/collections/circuit-breakers would help Pakistani buyers find the official local source with PKR pricing, local warranty, and fast delivery.

Best regards,
CNC Electric Pakistan

unlinked_mentions.mention_text: CNC Electric breakers tagged on Daraz marketplace
unlinked_mentions.context_snippet: Daraz.pk has a tag page for CNC Electric breakers with product listings. No link to cncelectric.pk official store.
unlinked_mentions.action: Daraz is a marketplace — create official Daraz store or contact about brand page link
unlinked_mentions.email_draft: N/A — Daraz is a marketplace, handle via official store setup

unlinked_mentions.mention_text: CNC Molded Case Circuit Breakers YCM1 product page
unlinked_mentions.context_snippet: microsolution.com.pk sells CNC MCCBs (YCM1) with pricing in Pakistan. Product page mentions CNC brand but likely no link to cncelectric.pk.
unlinked_mentions.action: Contact microsolution.com.pk — request authorized distributor link
unlinked_mentions.email_draft:
Subject: CNC Electric Pakistan — official distributor link request

Hi,

I noticed your page for CNC Molded Case Circuit Breakers. As the authorized CNC brand distributor in Pakistan, we can provide your customers with warranty verification and technical support.

Would you consider adding a link to https://www.cncelectric.pk/collections/mccb as the official Pakistan source?

Best regards,
CNC Electric Pakistan
